drl:
rule "R0"
salience 8
agenda-group "ga"
when
    not(T1(f0 == 3.5) and not(T0()))
    T0()

end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0(f3 == true, $b1_0_0 : f3, $b1_0_1 : f3, f3 == false)
then
    insert(new T1(6));
    $p1_0.setF3(true);
    $p1_0.setF2($p1_0.getF2());
    $p1_0.setF2(-0.5);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( T0($b2_0_0 : f3, $b2_0_1 : f3) and T0($b2_1_0 : f2) and exists T1(f0 != 7, f0 > 1.5, f0 > $b2_1_0) )
    or
    ( T0($b2_0_0 : f3, $b2_0_1 : f3) and T0($b2_1_0 : f2) and exists T1(f0 != 0, f0 > 1.5, f0 > $b2_1_0) )

rule "R3"

when
    $p3_0 : T0(f3 != false, f3 not in (false, true), f3 == false)

    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"

when
    T0($b4_0_0 : f3, $b4_0_1 : f3)
    T0($b4_1_0 : f2)

end
rule "R5"
agenda-group "gb"
when

end
